# Dependency Graph

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED -->

Module-to-module import relationships with documentation coverage annotations.

## Library Internal Dependencies (src/lib/)

Most lib modules import from other lib modules. The dependency edges are:

```
ansi             (100% doc)  <- no internal deps
hook-flags       (100% doc)  <- no internal deps

utils            (100% doc)  <- no internal deps (uses Node builtins only)
  ^
  |-- package-manager   imports: utils (commandExists, getClaudeDir, readFile, writeFile)
  |-- session-aliases   imports: utils (getClaudeDir, ensureDir, readFile, log)
  |-- session-manager   imports: utils (getSessionsDir, readFile, log)

smart-merge      (100% doc)  <- imports: ansi (red, green, dim, bold, stripAnsi)
merge            (100% doc)  <- imports: smart-merge, ansi, manifest (type only)
detect           (100% doc)  <- no internal deps (uses fs/path directly)
manifest         (100% doc)  <- no internal deps (uses fs/path directly)
project-detect   (100% doc)  <- no internal deps (uses fs/path directly)
gitignore        (100% doc)  <- no internal deps (uses fs/path/child_process directly)
```

## Detailed Import Map

### lib/ -> lib/

| Source Module | Imports From | Symbols Used |
|--------------|-------------|--------------|
| package-manager | utils | `commandExists`, `getClaudeDir`, `readFile`, `writeFile` |
| session-aliases | utils | `getClaudeDir`, `ensureDir`, `readFile`, `log` |
| session-manager | utils | `getSessionsDir`, `readFile`, `log` |
| smart-merge | ansi | `red`, `green`, `dim`, `bold`, `stripAnsi` |
| merge | smart-merge | `generateDiff`, `smartMerge`, `isClaudeAvailable`, `contentsDiffer`, `computeLineDiff` |
| merge | ansi | `bold`, `dim`, `green`, `yellow`, `cyan` |
| merge | manifest | `EccManifest` (type import only) |

### Standalone Scripts -> lib/

| Script | Imports From |
|--------|-------------|
| install-orchestrator | detect (`detect`, `generateReport`), manifest (`readManifest`, `writeManifest`, `createManifest`, `updateManifest`), merge (`mergeDirectory`, `mergeSkills`, `mergeRules`, `mergeHooks`, `printMergeReport`, `combineMergeReports`, `defaultMergeOptions`, `MergeOptions`, `EccManifest`), gitignore (`ensureGitignoreEntries`, `findTrackedEccFiles`, `gitUntrack`) |
| postinstall | ansi (`green`, `yellow`, `red`, `bold`, `dim`) |
| setup-package-manager | package-manager (`PACKAGE_MANAGERS`, `getPackageManager`, `setPreferredPackageManager`, `setProjectPackageManager`, `getAvailablePackageManagers`, `detectFromLockFile`, `detectFromPackageJson`) |
| skill-create-output | ansi (`bold`, `cyan`, `green`, `yellow`, `magenta`, `gray`, `white`, `red`, `dim`, `bgCyan`, `stripAnsi`) |
| claw | (no lib imports -- uses fs/path/os/child_process/readline directly) |
| preuninstall | (no lib imports -- uses fs/os/path directly) |

| session-end | utils (`getSessionsDir`, `getDateString`, `getTimeString`, `getSessionIdShort`, `ensureDir`, `readFile`, `writeFile`, `replaceInFile`, `log`) |
| stop-uncommitted-reminder | utils (`isGitRepo`, `runCommand`, `log`) |

| post-bash-build-complete | (no lib imports) |

### CI Validators -> lib/

All CI validators are standalone (no lib imports). They use `fs`, `path`, and `vm` (validate-hooks) directly.

## Hub Analysis

| Module | Fan-in (# of importers) | Classification |
|--------|------------------------|----------------|
| **utils** | 11 (3 lib + 8 hooks) | **Primary hub** |
| **ansi** | 4 (1 lib + 1 lib-transitive + 2 scripts) | Secondary hub |
| **hook-flags** | 2 (2 hooks) | Hook infrastructure |
| **package-manager** | 2 (1 hook + 1 script) | Detection utility |
| **smart-merge** | 1 (merge) | Merge infrastructure |
| **session-aliases** | 1 (session-start hook) | Session management |
| **project-detect** | 1 (session-start hook) | Detection utility |
| **detect** | 1 (install-orchestrator) | Install infrastructure |
| **manifest** | 1 (install-orchestrator, merge type-only) | Install infrastructure |
| **gitignore** | 1 (install-orchestrator) | Install infrastructure |
| **merge** | 1 (install-orchestrator) | Install infrastructure |
| **session-manager** | 0 (used by tests/external only) | Session management |

No module exceeds fan-in of 11. **No circular dependencies detected.**
